creator: sbahra@gwu.edu
text:
Looks good.
 
 --
 Samy Al Bahra
   `------ http://samy.kerneled.org/
 
 
 ----- Original Message -----
 From: Thomas Abthorpe <thomas@goodking.ca>
 Date: Monday, April 2, 2007 4:31 pm
 Subject: [PATCH] devel/elfsh: make fetchable
 To: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org
 Cc: sbahra@gwu.edu, thomas@goodking.ca
 
 
 > >Submitter-Id:	current-users
 > >Originator:	Thomas Abthorpe
 > >Organization:	GoodKing.Ca
 > >Confidential:	no 
 > >Synopsis:	[PATCH] devel/elfsh: make fetchable
 > >Severity:	non-critical
 > >Priority:	low
 > >Category:	ports 
 > >Class:        	change-request
 > >Release:	FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE-p3 i386
 > >Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD goodking.goodking.ca 6.2-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 
 > 6.2-RELEASE-p3 #2: Fri Mar 16 16:20:06 EDT 2007
 > >Description:
 > - make fetchable, project has new home
 > - update MASTER_SITE and WWW
 > 
 > Port maintainer (sbahra@gwu.edu) is cc'd.
 > 
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
 > >How-To-Repeat:
 > >Fix:
 > 
 > --- elfsh-0.51b3_1.patch begins here ---
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/devel/elfsh/Makefile /usr/local/tinderbox/portstrees/FreeBSD/ports/devel/elfsh/Makefile
 > --- /usr/ports/devel/elfsh/Makefile	Wed Mar  7 00:40:27 2007
 > +++ 
 > /usr/local/tinderbox/portstrees/FreeBSD/ports/devel/elfsh/Makefile	Mon 
 > Apr  2 16:27:04 2007
 > @@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
 >  PORTVERSION=	0.51b3
 >  PORTREVISION=	1
 >  CATEGORIES=	devel
 > -MASTER_SITES=	
 > +MASTER_SITES=	
 >  DISTNAME=	elfsh-0.51b3-portable
 >  EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 >  
 > @@ -18,6 +18,6 @@
 >  
 >  WRKSRC=        	${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 >  USE_GMAKE=	yes
 > -INSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
 > +USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 >  
 >  .include <bsd.port.mk>
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/devel/elfsh/pkg-descr /usr/local/tinderbox/portstrees/FreeBSD/ports/devel/elfsh/pkg-descr
 > --- /usr/ports/devel/elfsh/pkg-descr	Sat Aug 16 02:06:14 2003
 > +++ 
 > /usr/local/tinderbox/portstrees/FreeBSD/ports/devel/elfsh/pkg-descr	Mon 
 > Apr  2 16:24:46 2007
 > @@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
 >  symtab merging support), disassembly (with good resolving) on 
 >  i386 binaries with libasm, and much more. 
 >  
 > - WWW: 
 > + WWW: 
 >  
 >  - Samy Al Bahra
 >  samy@kerneled.com
 > --- elfsh-0.51b3_1.patch ends here ---
